jobs.title: Account Executive
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>Elastic, the Search AI Company, enables everyone to find the answers they need in real time, using all their data, at scale — unleashing the potential of businesses and people. As an <strong>Account Executive</strong>, you'll own the United Kingdom enterprise territory for the Elastic Stack, partnering with Sales Engineering and Solutions Architects to drive land-and-expand motions across Elastic Cloud, Elastic Observability, and Elastic Security.</p><p>You’ll partner with Marketing and Customer Success to forecast pipeline and prepare schedules for the EMEA quarterly business review.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - Search Platform
jobs.content: <p>Elastic’s <strong>Search Platform Engineering</strong> team is looking for a Senior Software Engineer to lead the Elasticsearch distributed-query layer behind Elastic Cloud, Elastic Observability, and Elastic Security.</p><p>You'll partner with Product, Solutions Architecture, and Customer Success to drive a roadmap that scales the Search AI Platform to tens of thousands of customer clusters globally.</p>
